task: P0: integrate Alibaba Zvec as context-index backend
implementation_summary: Replaced obsolete zvec/createIndex/add/search assumptions with dynamic import("@zvec/zvec") and collection-backed adapter logic.
Added GPTWORK_CONTEXT_VECTOR_STORE=auto|zvec|local runtime configuration and wired it through createVectorStore, indexGoalContext, retrieveContext, and context bundle hooks.
Implemented zvec-collection-store with required schema fields, VECTOR_FP32 embedding, goal/workspace/source filters, retriever-compatible result shape, and removeGoalChunks by goal_id filter.
Added tests for local mode, auto fallback when @zvec/zvec cannot load, zvec fail-fast behavior, runtime config, and removal of obsolete API assumptions.
Added @zvec/zvec to optionalDependencies because the package uses platform-native optional binding packages and local/auto fallback must remain usable on unsupported CI platforms.

test_results.command: cd backend && npm run check:syntax && npm run check:imports

test_results.result: passed; no obsolete API usage found
passed; @zvec/zvec imports and exposes ZVecCollectionSchema, ZVecCreateAndOpen, ZVecDataType, ZVecIndexType, ZVecMetricType

test_results.command: cd backend && node --input-type=module zvec adapter smoke script
test_results.result: passed; store=zvec-collection-store, filtered search returned expected chunk, removeGoalChunks deleted goal chunks

notes: @zvec/zvec installed and ran successfully on the current linux-x64 environment.
npm may emit allow-scripts warnings for @zvec/zvec native install scripts in this environment, but import and runtime smoke tests succeeded.
auto mode falls back to local-json-store when @zvec/zvec import/init fails; zvec mode fails clearly instead of falling back.

acceptance.context_retrieval_storeName: wired to report actual storeName through retriever output
